creator: alex@braske.net
text:
http://centericq.de/archive/source/releases/ - one of the MASTER_SITES of net-im/centericq was shutdown. The owner of the website moved to using CenterIm because: "CenterICQ development can be considered nothing but dead and the CenterIM development community has managed to produce at least something that's less broken ;)"

Fix: 

Remove http://centericq.de/archive/source/releases/ from net-im/centericq MASTER_SITES.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/net-im/centericq && make fetch
